title: Jen's Slow Cooker Beef Stew
description: A deeply savory slow cooker stew with tender beef, root vegetables, red wine, and Worcestershire. Minimal prep, mostly hands-off. Tenderloin is best; lamb works well too.

ingredients.name: cubed beef stew meat (tenderloin is best; lamb works too)
large Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled and cubed
dry red wine (Merlot or Cabernet Sauvignon)

instructions.text: Place cubed stew meat in the slow cooker and coat with flour.
Add all remaining ingredients and stir to combine.
Cover and cook on High for 30 minutes. Reduce heat to Low and cook for an additional 6 hours.

notes:
Optional additions: 1 lb cooked and crumbled bacon, mushrooms, peas, or corn — add any of these in the last hour on Low.

Cook time listed is 6.5 hours total (30 min High + 6 hrs Low). The flour coating on the meat thickens the broth as it cooks — no separate roux needed.
